nasb.text: Then they will know that I, the Lord their God, am with them, and that they, the house of Israel, are My people,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: And they shall know that I am the Lord their God with them, and that they, the house of Israel, are my people, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 那時，他們就知道我耶和華他們的　神與他們同在，並且知道他們以色列家是我的子民。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 这样，以色列人就知道我耶和华——他们的上帝与他们同在，他们是我的子民，这是主耶和华说的。
